testcase.name: Root_Still_Returns_200_After_Other_Calls
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Root still returns 200 after other calls given the mock API client is ready ... Status.untested in 0.0s when I GET "/" ... Status.untested in 0.0s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.untested in 0.0s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Items_Endpoint_Returns_200_With_Empty_List_After_Reset
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Items endpoint returns 200 with empty list after reset given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001957s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.005264s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.411e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Create_Two_Items_And_List_Them
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Create two items and list them given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001249s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.001164s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 5.317e-05s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.passed in 0.0009532s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.816e-05s when I GET "/items" ... Status.passed in 0.0009332s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.passed in 4.292e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Get first item by id given the mock API client is ready ... Status.untested in 0.0s when I POST to "/items" with JSON ... Status.untested in 0.0s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.untested in 0.0s when I GET "/items/1" ... Status.untested in 0.0s then the status code should be 200 ... Status.untested in 0.0s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Secure_With_Invalid_Bearer_Returns_401
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Secure with invalid bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.untested in 0.0s when I request GET "/secure" with Authorization "Bearer invalid-token" ... Status.untested in 0.0s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.untested in 0.0s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Admin with malformed bearer returns 401 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001161s when I request GET "/admin" with Authorization "not-bearer xyz" ... Status.passed in 0.001014s then the status code should be 401 ... Status.passed in 4.411e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.system-out:

scenario: Delete missing item returns 404 given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001252s when I DELETE "/items/999" ... Status.passed in 0.0009842s then the status code should be 404 ... Status.passed in 4.196e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

testcase.name: Login_Default_Username_Path
testcase.system-out:
@scenario.begin
scenario: Login default username path given the mock API client is ready ... Status.passed in 0.0001121s when I POST to "/login" with JSON ... Status.passed in 4.292e-05s @scenario.end ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
